summary: The diff implements accessibility improvements to the color palette in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js, darkening foreground colors and adjusting terracotta, forest, and sand scales to meet WCAG AA contrast ratios while preserving the warm earthy identity. The core REQ-12 requirements appear largely addressed, though some acceptance criteria cannot be fully verified from the diff alone.

missing_requirements.requirement: Changes are visually consistent across Home, ItineraryForm, ItineraryDetail, and all shared components (Layout, cards, forms).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only modifies index.css and tailwind.config.js. No individual component files were modified. If components use hard-coded color classes that do not reference the updated tokens, they would not benefit from the changes and visual consistency cannot be confirmed.

hallucinated_features.description: Dark mode color scheme defined in index.css under .dark selector
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly lists 'Dark mode implementation' as a non-goal, yet the diff adds a full .dark CSS variable block in index.css.
